tool_args.label: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2
tool_args.raw_text: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 will move forward. Impact: $5 billion

payload.status: Reactivate first major contract for Tunnelling – shortlist & December RFP
payload.description: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 will move forward with congestion pricing funding.

extra_fields.funding_note: $3 billion in MTA local funding and $2 billion in federal support included in 2020-2024 Capital Plan

tool_args.label: 2020-2024 Plan Final 23 ADA Stations
tool_args.raw_text: The final 23 ADA stations of the 20-24 Plan can begin to move forward. Impact: $2 billion

payload.project_name: Final 23 ADA Stations of the 2020-2024 Plan
payload.status: Packages of already-designed stations to begin procurement
payload.description: The final 23 ADA stations of the 20-24 Plan can begin to move forward.

tool_args.label: Zero-Emission Bus Program
tool_args.raw_text: Both buses and depot charging infrastructure will proceed. Impact: $500 million

payload.status: Both buses and depot charging infrastructure will proceed
payload.description: Electric bus procurement and depot charging infrastructure build-out.

tool_args.label: Upgrades to Infrastructure & Technology
tool_args.raw_text: Valuable upgrades and system improvements will proceed. Impact: $1.5 billion. Resume procurements on Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge ramp reconstruction and main cable dehumidification

payload.status: Resume procurements on Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge ramp reconstruction and main cable dehumidification
payload.description: Valuable upgrades and system improvements will proceed.

tool_args.label: Rolling Stock Replacement
tool_args.raw_text: More support for replacing aging railcars throughout the system. Impact: $1.5 billion. Purchase new dual-mode locomotives for LIRR

payload.status: Purchase new dual-mode locomotives for LIRR
payload.description: More support for replacing aging railcars throughout the system.

tool_args.label: Signal Modernization
tool_args.raw_text: Signal upgrades & state of good repair work to replace 1930s-era signals on the AC and BDFM lines will proceed. Impact: $3 billion

payload.status: Restart Fulton Line AC procurement (and bundle the Liberty Line A)
payload.description: Signal upgrades & state of good repair work to replace 1930s-era signals on the AC and BDFM lines.

tool_args.label: State of Good Repair Projects
tool_args.raw_text: Critical state of good repair projects are now able to proceed as well. Impact: $3 billion. Restart station reconstruction and ADA upgrades at Hollis LIRR. Procurement for subway station renewals at Briarwood EF.

payload.status: Restart station reconstruction and ADA upgrades at Hollis LIRR; procurement for subway station renewals at Briarwood EF
payload.description: Critical state of good repair projects are now able to proceed as well.

payload.claim_text: Congestion pricing supports critical projects with $16.5 billion in funding allocated to six project categories

tool_args.label: MTA C&D Transformed Project Delivery
tool_args.raw_text: Since its creation, MTA C&D has transformed the way we deliver projects

payload.claim_text: Since its creation, MTA C&D has transformed the way we deliver projects
payload.subject: MTA Construction & Development

tool_args.label: MTA C&D Better Faster Cheaper
tool_args.raw_text: BETTER: Smarter scope & design, Innovation through Design-Build, P3s, A+B, Focus on project management. FASTER: Bundle projects for economies of scale/geography, Incentivize contractors & consultants, Better coordination with labor & utilities. CHEAPER: Limit over-customization, Improve outage & force account planning, Reduce cost drivers like insurance

payload.claim_text: MTA C&D is delivering better, faster, and cheaper projects through smarter scope, design-build innovation, bundling, incentives, and cost reduction
payload.subject: MTA Construction & Development
